data.title: Encryption Standard Adoption
data.description: Ensuring all data in transit and at rest is securely encrypted.
data.technical_spec: Usage of TLS 1.2+ and AES-256 encryption for securing data across networks.

data.title: Continual Security Assessments
data.description: Regular penetration testing and security assessments to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Integration of automated testing tools and code review processes into CI/CD pipeline.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Robust incident response strategies to manage potential security breaches.
data.technical_spec: SOAR platforms used for automating incident response and threat intelligence sharing.

data.title: User Authentication Protocols
data.description: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) and single sign-on (SSO) to protect user accounts.
data.technical_spec: LDAP/Active Directory integrations and OAuth 2.0 protocol for secure credentials handling.

data.title: Identity Management
data.description: Role-based access control to ensure data privacy and limit access to sensitive information.
data.technical_spec: Integration with IAM solutions to manage user permissions centrally.
